steps.title: Identify the supporting signal
steps.content: The discoveries (fourth-century coin and matching materials) align perfectly with the theory, so they must furnish supporting evidence for the dating claim, not contradict it.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Provide directly fits: discoveries furnish the supporting evidence. The other three either contradict this logic (dismiss, refuse) or are irrelevant to evidence (regulate). That matches choice B — B is correct.
